description_long: This is a rugged wooden storage crate with a weathered, grayish-brown finish, featuring visible wood grain and reinforced edges. The front and one side display the iconic Jurassic Park logo, with a red and yellow circular emblem and a black dinosaur silhouette, as well as the 'InGen' branding. One side of the crate is marked by a large, dramatic red blood splatter, suggesting hazardous or valuable contents. The top is flat and solid, constructed from the same planked wood as the sides, and appears to be a removable flat lid. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, giving it a utilitarian, industrial look. The crate is large and sturdy, suitable for placement on the ground in urban or park environments, and can support significant weight on its top surface.
description: A large, weathered wooden crate with Jurassic Park branding, reinforced edges, and a dramatic blood splatter on one side. The crate has a flat, removable lid and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Jurassic Park logo and InGen branding on a weathered wooden surface.
description_view_1: Side view features a large, vivid red blood splatter on the wooden planks, with no logos.
description_view_2: Opposite side also displays the Jurassic Park logo and InGen branding, but with a cracked and distressed appearance.
description_view_3: Rear view is plain, showing only the weathered wood planks with no markings or logos.
